# classID

**Instance Property**

The class identifier of the token driver.

## Declaration

```swift
var classID: TKTokenDriver.ClassID { get }
```

## Discussion

The identifier uses a reverse-DNS format, such as `com.example.id`.

## Reporting Configuration Information

- **tokenConfigurations**: A dictionary of all currently configured tokens for this token class, which the token instance identifier keys.
- **driverConfigurations**: A dictionary of token class configurations which the class identifier of the token driver keys.
